operational_knowledge_units.title: RobotTaskDatabaseModel tracks sorter sweeper tote task status
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the RobotTaskDatabaseModel table tracks the status of tote tasks requested by the sorter sweeper module.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'The RobotTaskDatabaseModel table tracks the status of the tote task requested by the sorter sweeper module.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: RobotTaskDatabaseModel table in the Robotics Database tracks status for tote tasks requested by the sorter sweeper module.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Completed robot tasks are archived to RobotTaskActivity
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that when robot tasks are complete, they are archived from the active task model into RobotTaskActivity.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'When tasks are complete. They are archived to RobotTaskActivity'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: In the Robotics Database model, completed tasks are archived to RobotTaskActivity after being tracked in RobotTaskDatabaseModel.
